title: Jamaican Chicken Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful slow-cooked stew from Jamaica, made with tender chicken and aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add cumin, tagine spice mix, and tomato paste. Cook for 1 minute.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in brown sugar and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
